_notes: Chapter progression for SproutLab's device-sync work. Reflects actual delivery state as of 17 April 2026 end-of-session: Phase 1 and Phase 2 complete; C0 emergency patches shipped; Session 1 reconcile planned but not yet started.

patch.summary: Firebase Auth + Firestore sync layer for SproutLab. Phases 1 (auth, household CRUD, save hook) and 2 (sync engine, listeners, diffing, seed) shipped 13-14 April 2026. Emergency hardening on 17 April (C0 v3 + C0 v3.1) after multi-device field testing surfaced B1–B4. Session 1 reconcile (spec-locked R3, ~211 LOC across C1–C6) is the remaining implementation work and resolves KL-1, offline-write loss, per-entry partial shrink, and P4R5-7 cancellation propagation.

sub_phases.name: Phase 1: Foundation
sub_phases.summary: Auth flow (Google popup + redirect), household CRUD (create, join by code, leave), Settings UI rendering, save() hook for Phase 2 integration. ~400 LOC across config.js + sync.js + core.js.

sub_phases.name: Phase 2: Sync Engine
sub_phases.summary: syncWrite router, per-entry and single-doc models, _syncDeepDiff, _syncDiffArray, debounced flush, seed, listeners. Hardened same day with try/catch, circuit breaker, ?nosync bypass, empty-guard for per-entry, joining-device-doesn't-seed, force-reseed v4. Did NOT catch B3 (line 471 shadow contamination) or B4 (dotted-path set+merge behavior) — both discovered 17 April under production multi-device use.

sub_phases.name: C0 v3: B3 Fix + Listener-Ready Gating
sub_phases.summary: Emergency patch removing line 471, adding per-collection listener-ready tracking with spec §4.6 adaptive fallback, ALWAYS_POPULATED_KEYS allowlist (Maren's design), debounce-defer in listener (Kael's fix), reset-on-detach. Commit 5427899. ~90 LOC net sync.js. Four-governor review chain: Maren → Kael → Cipher → Consul. Option Y deploy (delete household + reseed). Canary: single feeding entry reached Firestore successfully.

sub_phases.name: C0 v3.1: Nest Dotted Paths Before Set+Merge
sub_phases.summary: Follow-up patch after multi-device canary exposed B4: _syncDeepDiff produces dotted paths (correct for update(), wrong for set+merge which creates literal-dotted top-level fields). Added _syncNestDottedPaths helper; _syncFlushSingleDoc now wraps diff.updates in nest before set+merge. Commit 5ab16cf. ~15 LOC net. KL-2 documented (orphan dotted-literal fields from pre-fix pushes). Abbreviated full-formal review round. Canary: food + activity logging both verified in Firestore.

sub_phases.name: Session 1: Reconcile Greenfield
sub_phases.summary: Per spec-2026-04-17-aurelius-device-sync-reconcile.md §12. Six commits (C1–C6, ~211 LOC net). Resolves KL-1, offline-write loss, per-entry partial shrink, P4R5-7 cancellation. Unblocked by C0 v3's listener-ready infrastructure. Scheduled AFTER Consul Co4 portfolio rotation (Codex backfill + SEP check-in priority next 3 days).

known_limitations.note: Concurrent multi-device writes during 2s debounce window can lose remote deltas via {merge:true} field-level overwrite.
Orphan dotted-literal top-level fields from pre-B4-fix pushes persist in Firestore. Harmless, ignored by listener, contribute to 1MB doc size but do not regrow under C0 v3.1 fix.
Concurrent remote writes during reconcile push phase converge via Firestore last-writer-wins. Out of Session 1 scope.
